CommandLineResponse.description: One authoritative command-line projection and its optimistic-concurrency revision.

CommandTarget.description: The desk-local default scope used when an operator starts a command.

CueMoveCopyChoice.description: Choice presented when Cue copy or move semantics would otherwise be ambiguous.

PatchDelta.description: Targeted post-mutation projection suitable for a Patch store and a typed patch-change event.

event_sequence.description: Sequence of the semantic patch-change event, absent for a no-op desired-state request.

profile_revisions.description: Unique metadata needed to interpret the fixture projections in this delta.

ip_address.description: Transport adapters validate this as an IP address before invoking the application service.

PatchFixtureProjection.description: Portable, authoritative Patch representation of one fixture without an inline definition.

profile_head_id.description: Stable semantic head identity from the selected immutable profile revision.

PatchProfileRevisionProjection.description: Deduplicated, Patch-only metadata for one immutable profile revision.

referenced_modes.description: Only modes referenced by fixtures in the containing snapshot or delta, never the catalog.

ProgrammerSelectionProjection.description: Ordered desk-local selection and the operation revision which produced it.

ProgrammingCaptureModeProjection.description: Authoritative capture routing for one user's Programmer.

ProgrammingInteractionChange.description: Sparse authoritative components changed by one semantic Programmer interaction.

ProgrammingValuesProjection.description: Full retained projection of one user's normal, recordable Programmer values.
